title: Moderation Update: High-Severity Reports Addressed
body:
We have processed the latest high-severity abuse reports:

- A spam account engaged in high-volume phishing across multiple channels has been permanently banned.
- A member who engaged in targeted harassment of newcomers has received a formal warning; further incidents will result in stronger sanctions.
- A high-severity report against a core maintainer was reviewed and confirmed as a false-positive resulting from brigading; no action has been taken against the maintainer.

Thank you to everyone who continues to report abuse in good faith. Your reports help keep this community safe and welcoming. If you believe an action was taken in error, please contact the moderation team via the usual appeal channels.
